CPC Discussion topics.value:
We learned to pronounce our names. We took a screen shot. We did an ice breaker.  We looked at the agenda.  We discussed goals and then we spent the majority of the time in the communication skill (verbal) component | Agenda
Ice breaker - fond memory from childhood
#Iamremarkable
Communication - Part 2 - Body Language (Non-Verbal)
Wrap up 
Recap what you learned today
-What will you practice from now till we meet again 
-Email me with q
-Next week - Communication - Written
-Quote for the week | Importance of writing well, proofreading, parts of an email, things to remember when writing email. How can we handle multiple priorities? | I had a ToA - Communication Skills - Tell me about yourself. College 
Do we need to go College?
So many info on SNS or books etc, why need it?
Options
Community college (Associate degree)
Community college (2yrs) -> 4 yr University (2yrs) (Associate+Bachelor)
University (4yrs) (Bachelor degree)
Mandatory? | How to choose format of resume | Introduction, ice breaker, goals - colleges, subjects etc. | Tips-speaking slowly, giving pauses, avoiding filler sounds and words | How to know yourself in order to accomplish their goal. | Watched a video, discussed body language - eye contact, hand movements, as well as Dos and Don'ts | Email crafting, resume writing, how to be precise, respectful, concise, error-free | Planning ahead, managing multiple priorities, focused work | We also started discussing financial planning which we will continue next week | credit cards, savings, investments | Presented a slide deck on what is a resume and why it is important.  Showed examples of improved writing for the resume

CPC Why.value: Baseria was very involved.  Akbar was a bit late to join but got into the session very quickly.  I think they both enjoyed the session and asked questions, put comments in the chat etc. | There was a lot of interaction and interest from Baseria and Ahmad | A lot of interaction from Baseria and Ahmad | I only had one intern show up today (Baseria was absent) | We only had Baseria so I could focus my entire attention on her | Only Ahmad was there, Baseria was absent | I only had one intern - Ahmad was there and Baseria was absent | Baseria was absent | We had both interns and we had a great session.  I got feedback from both of them that the whole round was a great learning experience for them and they enjoyed it | I am happy to support new students and to know each other better. | Akira improved her resume and it looks pretty impressive. | Akira's resume is ready to go | Interns didn't work much and not talking much | She won't have time for internship this year. | We could have a good discussion about education needs | We have full house. | We started working on Resume | 1 out of 4 interns showed up but we had a great 1-on-1 chat | One Abdulghani Ali showed up today | I met both Isaiah and Ishmael together very first time. :) | Had 3 students join - Carlos, Abdulghani and Fernando | The interns were very present! | Good interaction | 2 of my interns showed up! | Fernando and Carlos were there and it was a great last session | 2 out of the 3 students were not actively engaged

CPC Anything else.value:
It was a lot of fun for me and hopefully the students will benefit from the sessions! | Baseria was absent | It was our last session.  I tremendously enjoyed working with the 2 interns and I feel there was value added and impact made. Thank you! | Justin has a bad internet and didn't participate much. | Feedback about Internship database.
I'd recommend you to gray out for the internship past due date because students cannot apply. 
Also, I wondered why Stanford is on the list while it's only target for CA residence. 
Thanks! | I have a piece of feedback - sometimes the interns are in trains, or in the playground or at work and it is really noisy and we are not able to hear each other and communicate well.  Thank you! | Thanks
